name: Large Scale — 30+ Node CRISPR Protocol Flowchart with Subgraphs
input: Create a comprehensive flowchart for a CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing experiment. Group into 5 subgraphs: (1) Design Phase: target gene selection, gRNA design using CRISPOR, off-target analysis with Cas-OFFinder, vector construction with pX459 backbone, sequence verification by Sanger. (2) Cell Culture: thaw HEK293T cells, passage to P3, seed in 6-well plates at 2x10^5 cells/well, grow to 70% confluence. (3) Transfection: prepare lipofectamine-DNA complex, add to cells, incubate 48h, check GFP reporter. (4) Selection & Screening: add puromycin 2μg/mL for 72h, expand surviving clones, extract genomic DNA, PCR amplify target region, T7 endonuclease assay, Sanger sequencing of clones, identify positive clones. (5) Validation: Western blot for protein knockout, RT-qPCR for mRNA levels, functional assay, off-target sequencing, final report. Include decision diamonds after T7 assay (editing detected?) and Western blot (knockout confirmed?). This should have at least 30 distinct nodes.
qualityCriteria: Diagram type is flowchart with at least 30 nodes
5 subgraphs present (Design, Cell Culture, Transfection, Selection, Validation)
gRNA design and off-target analysis nodes in Design subgraph
HEK293T cell culture nodes with passage and seeding details
Lipofectamine transfection and GFP check nodes present
T7 endonuclease assay with decision diamond
Western blot with knockout confirmed decision diamond
RT-qPCR and functional assay validation nodes
At least 30 distinct nodes rendered without syntax errors
